title: BEM-890 dispatch contour
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/messages').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

contour = {
  'status':'active',
  'name':'task_dispatch_contour',
  'purpose':'send accepted tasks from task registry/backlog to Worker internal contours through managed channel',
  'inputs':['governance/state/task_registry.json','governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'],
  'outputs':['governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl'],
  'routing':{
    'WRK-C1':['registry','architecture','schema'],
    'WRK-C2':['rule','channel','message','communication'],
    'WRK-C3':['workspace','product','testing','selftest','implementation']
  },
  'rules':['RULE-006','RULE-011','RULE-012']
}
Path('governance/state/dispatch_contour.json').write_text(json.dumps(contour, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

queue_items = [
 {'dispatch_id':'DSP-BEM890-001','task_id':'BEM-890-SELFTEST','target_contour':'WRK-C1','message_type':'task','payload_ref':'governance/state/dispatch_contour.json','status':'queued'},
 {'dispatch_id':'DSP-BEM890-002','task_id':'BEM-890-SELFTEST','target_contour':'WRK-C2','message_type':'task','payload_ref':'governance/state/message_envelope_schema.json','status':'queued'},
 {'dispatch_id':'DSP-BEM890-003','task_id':'BEM-890-SELFTEST','target_contour':'WRK-C3','message_type':'task','payload_ref':'governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json','status':'queued'}
]
queue = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
queue.write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(i, ensure_ascii=False) for i in queue_items) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

msg_log = Path('governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl')
existing = msg_log.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if msg_log.exists() else ''
for item in queue_items:
    msg = {
      'message_id':'MSG-' + item['dispatch_id'],
      'task_id':item['task_id'],
      'trace_id':'bem890_dispatch_contour',
      'source_object':'OBJ-DIR-001',
      'source_curator':'EL-CUR-DIR-001',
      'target_object':'OBJ-WRK-001',
      'target_curator':'EL-CUR-WRK-001',
      'message_type':item['message_type'],
      'payload_ref':item['payload_ref'],
      'created_at_utc3':'2026-05-29T23:48:00+03:00',
      'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-011','RULE-012'],
      'status':'recorded',
      'target_contour':item['target_contour']
    }
    existing += json.dumps(msg, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
msg_log.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-890 dispatch contour validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
queue = Path("governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl")
messages = Path("governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl")
errors = []
if not queue.exists():
    errors.append("dispatch queue missing")
if not messages.exists():
    errors.append("message log missing")
items = [] if not queue.exists() else [json.loads(x) for x in queue.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines() if x.strip()]
msg_text = "" if not messages.exists() else messages.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
for item in items:
    if item.get("target_contour") not in ["WRK-C1","WRK-C2","WRK-C3"]:
        errors.append(f"{item.get('dispatch_id')}: invalid contour")
    if "MSG-" + item.get("dispatch_id", "") not in msg_text:
        errors.append(f"{item.get('dispatch_id')}: message missing")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_dispatch_contour.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
for item in queue_items:
    if item['target_contour'] not in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
        errors.append(item['dispatch_id'] + ': invalid contour')
    if 'MSG-' + item['dispatch_id'] not in msg_log.read_text(encoding='utf-8'):
        errors.append(item['dispatch_id'] + ': message missing')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR.md').write_text('# BEM-890 Dispatch contour\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nQueue: governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl\n\nMessage log: governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-890 dispatch contour proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/dispatch_contour.json','governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl','governance/tools/validate_dispatch_contour.py','governance/reports/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM890 dispatch contour ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
